Date of issuance reference of traffic police

Properties.Name: ДокументОснование
Properties.Comment: Документ, на основании которого введен данный

v8:item.v8:content: Документ, на основании которого введен данный

Материальный ущерб от повреждения дорог и сооружений
Material damage from damage to roads and structures
Material damage from damage to vehicles
Number of the relevant reference of traffic police
Организация предприятия, от имени которой оформляется документ инвентаризации
Company on whose behalf inventory document issued
Description of damages as the result of road accident
Description of measures taken at road accident
Date of consideration of the case by the insurance company
Sum paid by the insurance company
Conditions for organizing and implementing transportation
Examination of the amount of damage
List of repairs after road accident
